meta.purpose: Capability stages, practice loops, and measurable indicators.
meta.load_condition: Load for learning, team standards, audits, or progressive quality improvement.

stages.name: Consistent motion
indicators: duration and easing values are consistent across components

stages.name: Tokenized motion system
indicators: full token scale defined (duration, easing, distance)
shared motion primitives cover 80% of animation patterns
designers can preview primitives in isolation
CI enforces primitive usage over raw values

stages.name: Motion-as-infrastructure
indicators: new components automatically inherit motion behavior from context
animation telemetry tracks real-user rendering performance
brand motion rebranding requires changing only tokens, not code
team runs design-review rituals using shared motion vocabulary

evolution_layers.name: Consistent motion → Tokenized motion system
evolution_layers.capability: Progress from Consistent motion to Tokenized motion system

evolution_layers.name: Tokenized motion system → Motion-as-infrastructure
evolution_layers.capability: Progress from Tokenized motion system to Motion-as-infrastructure

measurement.how: Track percentage_of_components_using_primitives over iterations of the practice loop.
Track duration_variance_across_components over iterations of the practice loop.
Track easing_consistency_score over iterations of the practice loop.
Track token_coverage_of_animation_patterns over iterations of the practice loop.
Track time_to_migrate_one_component over iterations of the practice loop.
Track designer_accessible_primitive_count over iterations of the practice loop.
